text:

The browser is open to the Askable Sessions page, which currently displays a dark background with instructions for the user to share their screen.   },

    "description": "The text on the screen updates to 'Perfect!'.",

    "page_location": "https://sessions.askable.com/ai-mod/658d054e92b10ad78862b9d1",
    "frame_description": "The dark screen now displays the word 'Perfect!' in white text."

    "description": "Detailed task instructions appear on the screen, explaining the scenario and goals for the user testing session.",

    "thinking": "The screen content changes to a new set of instructions, reminding the user to think aloud during the process.",

    "description": "The screen content updates with a reminder for the user to think aloud and share their thoughts during the task.",

    "frame_description": "The previous instructions are replaced by new text about thinking aloud."

    "thinking": "The screen content updates to inform the user that the target website (the prototype) is about to be opened automatically.",

    "description": "The screen content updates to inform the user that the target website is about to be opened in their browser.",

    "thinking": "A new browser tab is opened automatically, and the browser navigates to the Figma prototype URL. The event covers the time from the tab appearing to the content being fully loaded.",
